extDescription.message: Naturally obfuscate sensitive personal information with random characters or shapes before taking screenshots, without breaking the page layout.

tab_error_system.message: Cannot run on Chrome system pages or secure tabs.

tab_error_load.message: Error loading the extension. Please refresh the page.

mode_scramble_desc.message: Replace characters with random matching classes

mode_scramble_title.message: Text Mix: Replace with random letters/digits

mode_block_desc.message: Cover characters with solid black █ blocks

mode_block_title.message: Black Block: Redact characters with █ blocks

mode_blur_desc.message: Blur selected text with CSS filter

mode_image_desc.message: Click on images to blur them

mode_image_title.message: Image Blur: Click to make images blurry

mode_restore_desc.message: Drag or click masked elements to restore

mode_restore_title.message: Eraser: Drag text or click images to restore originals

guide_step_1.message: Right-click anywhere on the webpage and select 'Start Sensitive Info Masking' or click the 'Start' button above.

guide_step_2.message: Select your preferred masking type from the horizontal floating toolbar.

guide_step_3.message: Drag with your mouse over the text you want to hide. (For images, click them in Image mode.)

guide_step_4.message: To restore masked items, switch to 'Eraser' mode and drag over text or click on blurred images.

guide_step_5.message: When done, click 'Finish' to hide the toolbar and take a screenshot. (Supports Ctrl+Z / Ctrl+Y shortcuts)

footer_text.message: Compliant with Chrome Web Store Guidelines

toast_activated_welcome.message: Masking mode active. Drag text or click images to mask.
